creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port mew-1.92.4. Note that new Mew ports
	configuration changed. Make sure to make following directories 
	before you will be apply patch to current mew ports.

	% mkdir -p mail/mew-xemacs/pkg japanese/mew-{mule,xemacs}/pkg
	% zcat mew-1.92.4-980506.diff.gz | patch

	Current modifications is

		(1) Include XEmacs versions.

	Update files are respecively

	[Add] :
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST-common-emacs
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST-common-mule
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST-common-xemacs
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST-ja-mule
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST-ja-xemacs
		mail/mew-xemacs
		mail/mew-xemacs/Makefile
		mail/mew-xemacs/pkg/COMMENT
		mail/mew-xemacs/pkg/DESCR
		japanese/mew-mule
		japanese/mew-mule/Makefile
		japanese/mew-mule/pkg/COMMENT
		japanese/mew-mule/pkg/DESCR
		japanese/mew-xemacs
		japanese/mew-xemacs/Makefile
		japanese/mew-xemacs/pkg/COMMENT
		japanese/mew-xemacs/pkg/DESCR

	[Delete] :
		mail/mew/pkg/PLIST
		mail/mew-mule/pkg/PLIST
		japanese/mew
		japanese/mew/Makefile
		japanese/mew/pkg/COMMENT
		japanese/mew/pkg/DESCR

	[Update] :
		mail/mew/Makefile
		mail/mew-common/Makefile
		mail/mew-common/files/DEINSTALL.tmpl
		mail/mew-common/files/INSTALL.tmpl
		mail/mew-common/files/user-install.tmpl
		mail/mew-common/patches/patch-aa
		mail/mew-common/pkg/PLIST
		mail/mew-common/scripts/configure
		mail/mew-mule/Makefile

	I put the diff+gzip+uuencode from ports-current in "Fix:".
